# GitHub About section

Use these values in the repo **About** box (click the gear next to "About" on the right sidebar).

| Field | Value |
|-------|--------|
| **Description** | Project site and browse & search UI for PARTYPRESS — party press releases across European countries. |
| **Website** | https://partypress.org |
| **Topics** | `political-science` `party-press-releases` `comparative-politics` `static-site` |
